free_text: Fission of ODD-A AND doubly ODD actinide nuclei induced
by direct reactions
Light-ion products detected by telescope
consisting of depleted silicon (DE) detectors, and
silicon (E) detectors.  Angle given for each reaction
is the angle of the detected light-ion.
Fission fragments detected by annular detector covering
laboratory angles from about 120-175 degrees with
respect to the beam axis.  Angle range chosen as the
dominant recoil direction of the detected fission
product.
Detector calibrated using 208Pb reactions to
established ground state Q values and excitation
energies.
Corrected for accidental coincidences.
Statistical uncertainty given.
Absolute uncertainty 20%.
Tabulated data received from B. Back, 10 February 1988.
Approved by B. Back, 12 February 2001.
VM
DR Reference corrected
Updated data received from B. Back, 12 February 2001.
